phases.name: digi_baseline
phases.criteria: Proximity Intercept (Intercept position 1NM behind and 1000' below tanker); Flight Stability (No NaNs or state divergence occurred during flight); Tanker Altitude Hold (Tanker altitude remains stable within ±500 ft)

conditions.name: Proximity Intercept
conditions.description: Intercept position 1NM behind and 1000' below tanker: Passed

conditions.name: Flight Stability
conditions.description: No NaNs or state divergence occurred during flight: Passed

conditions.name: Tanker Altitude Hold
conditions.description: Tanker altitude remains stable within ±500 ft: Passed
